Comparison

SpiniX vs Loopy Loyalty

Both are QR-based loyalty platforms. SpiniX uses gamification (spin wheels), Loopy uses digital stamp cards.

Updated February 2025

SpiniX vs Loopy Loyalty: quick verdict

Choose SpiniX if:

  • You want instant-win gamification (not stamps)
  • Google review generation is important
  • You want automated email follow-ups
  • Higher engagement matters more than simplicity

Choose Loopy Loyalty if:

  • You prefer traditional stamp card mechanics
  • Simplicity is your top priority
  • You don't need review generation
  • Lower price point is essential

SpiniX vs Loopy Loyalty: feature comparison

FeatureSpiniXLoopy Loyalty
Starting Price €29/month $15/month
Loyalty Mechanic Spin wheel (gamified) Digital stamps
Instant Rewards Yes (every spin wins) No (collect stamps first)
Google Review Generation Built-in (33% rate) Not included
Email Automation Yes (3-email sequence) Basic notifications
Email Capture Rate 46% ~30%
Customer Psychology Dopamine/instant gratification Delayed gratification
Setup Time 15 minutes 10 minutes
Mobile Wallet Apple/Google Wallet Apple/Google Wallet
White Label Pro plan Available
Best For Engagement-focused Budget-focused

  • • 1 location

  • • Basic analytics

  • • 3 stamp cards
  • • Customer segments
Ultimate $45/mo

  • • Remove branding

Lower price, traditional stamp mechanics.

SpiniX vs Loopy Loyalty: detailed breakdown

Gamification vs Stamps: The Core Difference

Loopy Loyalty digitizes the traditional stamp card - collect 10 stamps, get a reward. SpiniX uses gamification - spin a wheel, win instantly. Research shows 57% of customers prefer instant rewards over collecting stamps. The dopamine hit from spinning creates stronger emotional engagement than watching a stamp counter increment.

Psychology of Engagement

Stamp cards suffer from "goal gradient" dropout - most customers abandon before completing the card (only 20% finish). SpiniX's instant-win approach means every interaction is rewarding. Customers don't need to wait 10 visits to feel value. This drives 46% email opt-in vs ~30% for stamp-based programs.

Review Generation

SpiniX has Google review generation built into the core flow - customers are prompted right after winning (33% leave reviews). Loopy Loyalty is purely a loyalty tool and doesn't include review generation. If reviews matter for your business, SpiniX handles both in one platform.

Email Automation

SpiniX includes a 3-email automated sequence (Day 1, 7, 10) based on forgetting curve research. This brings customers back before they forget you. Loopy offers basic push notifications but not the same level of email automation for driving redemptions.

Price vs Value

Loopy is cheaper ($15 vs €29 starting). But SpiniX includes review generation that would cost $200+/month separately (Birdeye, Podium). If you need both loyalty AND reviews, SpiniX is actually cheaper total. If you only need basic loyalty, Loopy's lower price makes sense.

SpiniX vs Loopy Loyalty: performance data

MetricSpiniXCompetitor
Email Capture Rate46%~30%
Reward PsychologyInstant winDelayed (10 stamps)
Review Generation33%0%
Card Completion RateN/A (instant)~20%

SpiniX vs Loopy Loyalty: FAQ

Which is better for cafes specifically?

Both work well for cafes. If your customers love the traditional "buy 9, get 10th free" experience, Loopy is great. If you want to stand out with something more engaging and also get Google reviews, SpiniX is better.

Can I run both stamp cards and spin wheels?

With SpiniX, you can structure prizes to simulate stamps (e.g., "Free coffee after 5 visits" as a wheel segment). But true stamp mechanics require Loopy. You could technically run both systems for different customer segments.

Which has better customer support?

Both offer good support for their price points. SpiniX offers direct founder support on all plans. Loopy has email support with faster response on higher tiers.

What about customer data and analytics?

Both provide customer data and basic analytics. SpiniX focuses on engagement metrics (spins, redemptions, reviews). Loopy focuses on visit frequency and stamp progress.

Ready for Gamified Loyalty?

Instant rewards, review generation, and automated follow-ups in one platform.
